lint.command: cd frontend && pnpm install --frozen-lockfile && pnpm build

appliedUpdates.description: Documented that Ed25519 keys generated via ssh-keygen use OpenSSH format instead of PKCS8/PEM

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Remind workers to run frontend build when modifying public routes even if it's mostly a backend change.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: Worker for auth-logout-and-route-completion skipped `cd frontend && pnpm build` because it was a backend-only feature, despite the skill rules saying to run it.

rejectedObservations.observation: The worker made a conscious design decision to invalidate ALL of a user's refresh sessions upon logout, rather than just the specific session tied to the current refresh token hash. The worker took the initiative to document this behavior explicitly.
